description:
Goal
Make the compiler-owned native-program quicksort path preserve the `entry/0` result after a clean rebuild. Fresh verification shows the front-door root JIT path now passes, but `compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen` still returns `3` instead of `42`.

Signal
- `/opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 60s target/debug/deps/fz-01415279b97da685 --exact compiler2::compiler2_test::compiler2_compile_root_jit_consumes_native_program_without_legacy_prepare --nocapture` passes after `cargo clean` + fresh build.
- `/opt/homebrew/bin/timeout 60s target/debug/deps/fz-01415279b97da685 --exact compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen --nocapture` fails from the same fresh build with `left: 3`, `right: 42`.
- The fix makes the compiler-owned native-program path and the root-entry JIT path agree for `fixtures2/00020_quicksort_jit_entry.fz` without depending on stale artifacts.

Strategy
Compare the native program produced and consumed inside the compiler-owned drive/codegen path against the front-door path that now passes on a clean rebuild. Repair the stale-root/native-program replacement boundary or executable selection seam; do not paper over by changing expected values, adding a quicksort branch, or blaming parallelism before the alone failure is gone.

Outro
No compiler-owned/native-program quicksort divergence, no stale prepared native program after clean rebuild, no quicksort-specific codegen branch, and no closure claim based on warm artifacts.

failures:

failures:
    compiler2::drive_test::compiler2_native_program_jit_runs_quicksort_through_compiler2_codegen

test result: FAILED. 0 passed; 1 failed; 0 ignored; 0 measured; 2175 filtered out; finished in 0.10s failed with \, \. Reopened and retitled accordingly: the surviving bug is now in the compiler-owned native-program path, not the front-door root JIT path.

Fresh clean-build summary on 2026-06-12: after `cargo clean`, fresh `cargo build --bin fz2`, and fresh `cargo test --lib --no-run`, the front-door root JIT test passed but the compiler-owned native-program quicksort test still failed alone with left=3 right=42. This ticket remains open until those two paths agree from the same rebuilt artifacts.

title: Compiler2 native-program quicksort: preserve root result after clean rebuild
